name: odbc
label: ODBC
description: ODBC (Open Database Connectivity) allows applications to access data from different database systems (e.g., MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle). It enables interoperability between applications and databases through an ODBC driver.

fields.title: Connect By
fields.name: connection_type
fields.description: Select the method to establish the ODBC connection: either by using a pre-configured DSN on the system or by providing a full DSN-less connection string.

Using DSN.title: DSN Name
Using DSN.name: dsn_name
Using DSN.description: Specify the Data Source Name to establish the ODBC connection.
Using DSN.tooltip: Specify the Data Source Name to establish the ODBC connection.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: ODBC Driver
Using a DSN-less connection.name: driver
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: The name of the installed ODBC driver to use.
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Name of the ODBC driver (as registered in the system), e.g., 'PostgreSQL', 'MySQL ODBC 8.0 Unicode Driver', or 'Simba Spark ODBC Driver'.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: Database
Using a DSN-less connection.name: database
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: Name of the database to connect to. For SQLite, provide the full path to the .db file.
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Specify the database name (e.g., 'employees', 'testdb'). For SQLite, this should be the full file path to the .db file.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: Port
Using a DSN-less connection.name: port
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Port used for the ODBC connection. Defaults to 443 if not specified.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: HTTP Path
Using a DSN-less connection.name: http_path
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: Full HTTP Path used for the ODBC connection.
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Full HTTP Path used for the ODBC connection.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: Authentication Mechanism
Using a DSN-less connection.name: auth_mech
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: Authentication method for the ODBC driver. For tokens, use 3. Default is 3.
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Value for AuthMech parameter (use '3' when authenticating with a Databricks personal access token).

Using a DSN-less connection.title: Username
Using a DSN-less connection.name: username
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Username for ODBC authentication. For Azure Databricks, this should be 'token'.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: Access Token
Using a DSN-less connection.name: token
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: Personal access token used for authentication.
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Specify personal access token (PAT) used for authentication.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: SSL
Using a DSN-less connection.name: ssl
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: Enable SSL for secure connection. For Databricks specify 1.
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Enable SSL for secure encrypted communication. For Databricks specify 1.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: Thrift Transport
Using a DSN-less connection.name: thrift_transport
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: Specify the thrift transport. For Databricks specify 2.
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Specify the thrift transport. For Databricks specify 2.

Using a DSN-less connection.title: Additional Connection Parameters
Using a DSN-less connection.name: extra_options
Using a DSN-less connection.description: Any additional ODBC connection parameters (e.g., ReadOnly=1;Timeout=10;).
Using a DSN-less connection.tooltip: Specify any custom ODBC options not listed above.

fields.title: Auto Commit
fields.name: auto_commit
fields.description: Enable this option to automatically commit each SQL statement after execution without requiring an explicit commit.
fields.tooltip: If enabled, each SQL operation will be committed automatically. Disable it if you want to manage transactions manually.

operations.title: Execute Query
operations.description: Executes a custom SQL query on the connected ODBC data source and returns the result set.

parameters.title: Query
parameters.tooltip: Specify the SQL query string to be executed on the target ODBC database.
parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Specify the SQL query string to be executed on the target ODBC database.
